Overview

Overnight AI Refactoring/Codebase Improvement Prompts

This document contains overnight improvement prompts for codebases.

The Core Idea

Run AI overnight to improve your codebase systematically.

How to Use

Copy a prompt, paste it, let AI cook.

Suggested Order

Follow the numbered order below.

Conclusion

Start with one run tonight.

Meta Prompts

These are meta prompts for orchestrating multiple runs.

Use them to coordinate large improvement campaigns.

Documentation

You are running an overnight documentation generation pass. Deeply understand this codebase and produce a three-tier documentation system optimized for AI coding agents.

## The Three-Tier System

- **Tier 1 (Always Loaded):** Rules/conventions preventing mistakes on ANY task.

- **Tier 2 (On-Demand):** Per-topic implementation details.

- **Tier 3 (Deep Reference):** Human-facing docs, ADRs, API reference.

---

## Chat Output Requirement

When you finish, produce a brief summary.

Test Coverage

You are running an overnight test coverage expansion. Be thorough and methodical.

## Phase 1: Coverage Analysis

Run existing tests with coverage enabled. Identify uncovered files and functions.

## Phase 2: Write Tests

Write high-quality tests that catch bugs, not just inflate coverage numbers.

Test Hardening

You are running an overnight test hardening pass. Make the existing test suite more reliable.

## Phase 1: Flaky Test Diagnosis

Run the test suite multiple times. Identify tests that sometimes pass, sometimes fail.

Security Sweep

You are running an overnight security sweep. Scan the entire codebase for vulnerabilities.

## Phase 1: Static Analysis

Scan for common vulnerability patterns: SQL injection, XSS, command injection.

## Phase 2: Dependency Audit

Check all dependencies for known CVEs. Update or replace vulnerable packages.

Bug Hunt

You are running an overnight bug hunt. Find and fix bugs hiding in the codebase.

## Phase 1: Error Path Analysis

Trace every error path. Verify errors are caught, logged, and handled correctly.
